title: Background Styling
description: Apply background colors and gradients to create visually distinct sections on a page
html:
Welcome

Main content area

Footer area

validationRules.message: The hero should have a dark background (#333)
The hero text should be white
The content area should have a white background
The footer should have a gray background

hints.text: Background colors can be set with named colors, hex codes, or rgb values.
Use 'background-color' for each section. #333 is a common dark gray, 'white' for content, and 'gray' for footer.
.hero { background-color: #333; color: white; } .content { background-color: white; } .footer { background-color: gray; }
